'''Dire Wolf Hide''' is a resource item.

==Products==
{{Uses material list|Dire Wolf Hide}}

==Item sources==
{{Drop sources list|Dire Wolf Hide}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
A tougher, more resilient hide, obtained after slaying a deadly dire wolf. It is said that if you wear the hide of a dire wolf, during the light of a full moon, then you’ll rapidly reduce the size of your circle of friends.
}}
